title: angelica sinensis var. sinensis
intro: Angelica sinensis var. sinensis, also known as Dong Quai, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Angelica sinensis var. sinensis include its ability to promote menstrual regularity, reduce symptoms of menopause, and improve cardiovascular health, among others. Angelica sinensis var. sinensis is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
